documentation.description:
RFC 4253 Section 8: Standard Diffie-Hellman (2-message flow)
RFC 4419 Section 4: Diffie-Hellman Group Exchange (4-message flow)
draft-ietf-sshm-mlkem-hybrid-kex-10 Section 2: PQ/T Hybrid (2-message flow)
  uses Standard_DH flow type (same msg 30/31) but with asymmetric
  KEM-based Compute_Shared_Secret that updates Reply in-out.

record_types.name: Host_Key_Ops
KEX_Crypto_Ops

fields.name: Flow
fields.description:
RFC 8731 Section 3: fixed public key length in bytes.
0 means the key is a variable-length mpint and trailing-zero
trimming should be applied (traditional DH).  > 0 means the
key is a fixed-length byte string (Curve25519=32, Curve448=56).
For PQ/T hybrid, this is C_INIT = PK2 || PK1 (combined length).

fields.name: Pubkey_Byte_Len
fields.description:
draft-ietf-sshm-mlkem-hybrid-kex-10 Section 2.1:
PQ/T hybrid KEX uses SSH string payloads instead of mpint,
and K = HASH(K_PQ || K_CL) is encoded as SSH string (not mpint).

fields.name: Is_Hybrid
fields.description:
For hybrid KEX: the Reply (S_REPLY) = CT2 || PK1.
PQ_PK_Len is the PQ public key length (e.g. ML-KEM-768: 1184,
sntrup761: 1158); PQ_CT_Len is the PQ ciphertext length
(e.g. ML-KEM-768: 1088, sntrup761: 1039);
Trad_PK_Len is the traditional (EC)DH public key length.

fields.name: PQ_PK_Len
fields.description:
Select a DH group (p, g) meeting client's size criteria.
Used only for Group_Exchange flow; null for Standard_DH.

fields.name: PQ_CT_Len
fields.description:
Select a DH group (p, g) meeting client's size criteria.
Used only for Group_Exchange flow; null for Standard_DH.

fields.name: Trad_PK_Len
fields.description:
Select a DH group (p, g) meeting client's size criteria.
Used only for Group_Exchange flow; null for Standard_DH.

fields.name: Hash
fields.description:
Select a DH group (p, g) meeting client's size criteria.
Used only for Group_Exchange flow; null for Standard_DH.

fields.name: Generate_Keypair
fields.description:
Select a DH group (p, g) meeting client's size criteria.
Used only for Group_Exchange flow; null for Standard_DH.

fields.name: Compute_Shared_Secret
fields.description:
Select a DH group (p, g) meeting client's size criteria.
Used only for Group_Exchange flow; null for Standard_DH.

fields.name: Select_Group
fields.description:
RFC 4419 Section 4: GEX exchange hash
H = HASH(V_C || V_S || I_C || I_S || K_S ||
         min || n || max || p || g || e || f || K)
where min/n/max are uint32, p/g/e/f/K are mpint.
Used only for Group_Exchange flow; null for Standard_DH.

fields.name: Compute_H
fields.description:
RFC 4419 Section 4: GEX exchange hash
H = HASH(V_C || V_S || I_C || I_S || K_S ||
         min || n || max || p || g || e || f || K)
where min/n/max are uint32, p/g/e/f/K are mpint.
Used only for Group_Exchange flow; null for Standard_DH.
